title: gc route create --json result
description: One JSONL record describing a formula-backed routed work item created by gc route create.

formula.description: Formula attached to the created source bead.

method.description: Attachment method used by the routed work primitive.

wisp_root_id.description: Attached formula wisp root ID, when a formula was attached.

workflow_id.description: Workflow ID associated with the formula attachment, when available.

metadata.description: Metadata on the created source bead after routing and formula attachment.

dry_run.description: Whether the command ran without mutating state.
